arts.ttl: Everyone piles on – Harry Maguire calls for Man Utd to stick together
arts.sum: Defeat to Tottenham was compounded as United blew a two-goal Europa League lead against Porto.

arts.ttl: 'We're playing better than last season' - What Manchester United dressing room thinks of their form
arts.sum: Harry Maguire salvaged a draw for Man United against Porto in midweek and could start at Aston Villa on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives brutally honest response after being left out of England squad
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has opened up on his feelings after being omitted from the England squad to face Greece and Finland in the international break

arts.ttl: Papers: Van Nistelrooy to be offered interim Man Utd job if Ten Hag sacked
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Man United defender Lisandro Martinez and partner Muri Lopez Benitez announce they are expecting their first child as couple share baby scan pictures on social media
arts.sum: Manchester United centre-back Lisandro Martinez has shared that him and partner Muri Lopez Benitez are expecting their first child.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag sack: Man Utd face 'Mission Impossible'
arts.sum: The Inter mastermind has emerged as one of the names most prominently linked with the Red Devils job amid the growing pressure on Erik ten Hag. Man Utd bosses are set to meet next week to discuss the manager's future, with Sunday's game against Aston Villa likely to be a deciding factor. Simone Inzaghi has been described as Man Utd's 'dream target' after leading Inter to a Champions League final and Scudetto, but on Friday reports emerged that the Italian had turned down the job when approached by intermediaries.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Wonderkid with staggering goal record completes long-awaited Old Trafford move
arts.sum: Wonderkid Chibo Obi Martin confirms his move to Manchester United, joining the club following his departure from Arsenal over the summer.

arts.ttl: Steve McClaren opens up on working under Erik ten Hag as former Man United No 2 reveals the moment he thought this was 'the end' for under-fire manager
arts.sum: Ten Hag has been in charge of United since the summer of 2022, but it's been a mixed journey with trophies won but the Red Devils often struggling on the field and in the Premier league.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy wary of replacing Erik ten Hag as feelings on Man Utd job emerge
arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker will be offered the manager's job on an interim basis if Erik ten Hag is sacked after Sunday's trip to Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Obi-Martin confirms Man Utd move after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin has confirmed on his personal social media account that he has joined Manchester United.
